quotes.text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
quotes.author: Martin Fowler

quotes.text: If you can't explain it to a six-year-old, you don't understand it. If your code can't be read by a junior dev, you haven't simplified it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you can't explain your architecture in 3 sentences, you don't understand it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best icon is no icon. The second best is one with a label. The worst is a cryptic SVG from 2007.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you can't explain your business model in one sentence, you don't have one.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you can't explain your product in 30 seconds, your marketing page can't explain it in 30 seconds either.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers know the difference between clever code and clear code. They choose clear.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your SaaS has an 'enterprise' tier, your pricing page should explain the difference in one sentence.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your user interface should be like a good joke: if you have to explain it, it's not good.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
quotes.author: Harold Abelson

quotes.text: Your modal should have one action. Two actions means you're asking the user to decide. Three means you're confusing them.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your SaaS should have a 'plans' page that explains pricing in plain language. Not jargon. Plain language.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your dashboard should answer questions, not display charts. If you have to interpret it, it's failing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your team's output is a function of clarity, not hours. Clear goals beat long hours.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you can't explain your product's value in one sentence, you don't understand it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your product's homepage should answer: what does it do, who is it for, why should I care? In that order.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your indie business should be something you can explain to your parents. If you can't, simplify.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your indie business should be simple enough to explain in one sentence. If it takes a paragraph, simplify.
quotes.author: based
